title: Free Receipt Generator
metaTitle: Free Receipt Generator · Create & Download Payment Receipts · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Create payment receipts online for free. Add the amount, currency and method, then download a print-ready PDF in seconds. No signup required.
keywords: free receipt generator, payment receipt maker, create receipt online, free receipt template, download receipt pdf, cash receipt generator
heroSubtitle: Give every customer a clean payment receipt in seconds. Enter the amount, currency and payment method, then download a print-ready PDF. No account needed.

howToSteps.name: Add your details
howToSteps.text: Enter your company name, the payer, a receipt number and date.

howToSteps.name: Enter the payment
howToSteps.text: Add what the payment was for, the amount, and the method (cash, card, transfer).

howToSteps.name: Set currency & tax
howToSteps.text: Choose any currency and, if needed, show the VAT or sales-tax portion.

howToSteps.name: Download PDF
howToSteps.text: Click download to save a print-ready receipt, or sign up to issue receipts automatically against your invoices.

features.title: Instant & free
features.desc: No signup, no watermark, no limits. Issue as many receipts as you need.

features.title: Any currency
features.desc: Receipt in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR, GBP and more, with correct decimals.

features.title: Any payment method
features.desc: Record cash, card, bank transfer or online payment, clearly shown on the receipt.

sections.title: Why use the Paper & Pen receipt generator?
sections.body: A receipt is your customer's proof of payment and your record that an invoice was settled. Ours is free, works in any currency, and produces a clean PDF you can hand over or email immediately. No spreadsheet, no signup.

sections.title: Receipts that link to your invoices
sections.body: A standalone receipt is fine for a one-off, but a growing business needs receipts tied to invoices and a running ledger. Inside the full Paper & Pen ERP, recording a payment generates the receipt and updates the invoice balance and your books at the same time.
items: Auto-generate a receipt when an invoice is paid
Track full, partial and split payments
Send receipts by WhatsApp or email instantly

faqs.q: What is the difference between an invoice and a receipt?
faqs.a: An invoice requests payment before it is made. A receipt confirms payment was received afterwards. You can create both here for free.

faqs.q: Is the receipt generator really free?
faqs.a: Yes. It is completely free with no signup, no watermark and no limit on the number of receipts you create.

faqs.q: Can I show VAT or tax on a receipt?
faqs.a: Yes. Set any tax rate and the receipt will show the tax portion of the amount paid where you need it.

faqs.q: Can receipts be linked to my invoices?
faqs.a: Download standalone receipts for free, or create a free Paper & Pen workspace where every payment recorded against an invoice generates a linked receipt automatically.

ctaSub: Auto-generate receipts, track every payment and keep your ledger current with a free Paper & Pen workspace.
